temporal_description: The audio opens with a series of high-pitched, electronic beeps, creating a sense of digital activity and technology at work. A close-up shot focuses on a person's hand holding a small, dark object, possibly a key fob or a small electronic device. The background is a blurry, out-of-focus view of what appears to be a store shelf with various products. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera is slightly shaky, suggesting a handheld perspective. This is quickly overlaid by a low, ambient, and slightly tense electronic score. The music has a modern, tech-focused feel, with a subtle, pulsing rhythm that builds a mood of suspense and anticipation, as if tracking something or someone through a digital space. The scene cuts to an extreme close-up of a digital map on a screen. The map is rendered in a dark blue and black color palette. The camera pans slowly across the digital terrain, which is marked with various labels, including "NW" and "NE" in white text. The white Chinese characters "风行网" remain in the upper left corner. The view changes to a medium shot of a man with short black hair and glasses, standing in what looks like a convenience store at night. He is wearing a light-colored jacket and is looking down intently at a small device in his hands, which he appears to be operating. The store is dimly lit, with shelves of products and bright signs visible in the blurred background. The white Chinese characters "风行网" are still present in the upper left of the frame. The camera returns to a close-up of the digital map. The shot is tight on a section of the glowing blue and black interface. The camera continues its slow, deliberate pan across the digital landscape, revealing more of the map's intricate details and labels. The white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in the upper left corner.
